cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma where a sports journalist is covering a championship game and has a personal bias towards their childhood friend on one of the teams. The question is whether they should disclose this bias to their editor or keep it to themselves to maintain professional integrity. Let me think about this step by step.
